global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a clear focus on the brand and offer.
global.main_message: Promoting travel booking options at an attractive price.

elements.label: blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant backdrop for the other elements.

elements.label: HorizonHop logo
elements.description: The text 'HorizonHop' is prominently displayed in bold, large font at the top of the ad, conveying brand identity.

elements.label: Dream text
elements.description: The word 'Dream' is presented in a stylish font, positioned centrally to attract attention.

elements.label: Destinations await
elements.description: The phrase 'destinations await' is written in a clear, inviting font, placed below the 'Dream' text.

elements.label: top circle
elements.description: A small circular shape is located at the top left, adding a decorative touch to the ad.

elements.label: Flexible booking options
elements.description: The text 'Flexible booking options' is displayed in a smaller font, providing additional information.

elements.label: €29.99 price
elements.description: The price '€29.99' is highlighted in a bold font, drawing attention to the offer.

elements.label: center circle
elements.description: A medium-sized circular shape is positioned in the center, contributing to the visual interest.

elements.label: Get offer button
elements.description: The button 'Get offer' is prominently displayed at the bottom, encouraging user interaction.
elements.text_content: destinations await Flexible booking options €29.99 Get offer

elements.label: bottom circle
elements.description: A small circular shape is located at the bottom left, serving as a decorative element.

elements.label: Booking options text
elements.description: The text 'Flexible booking options' is presented in a smaller font, providing clarity on the offer.
